    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    S

    saveBudgets(int, ArrayList<Budget>) - Static method in class storage.UserDatabase
    Saves a list of budgets for a specific user to the file system.
    saveData() - Method in class controller.BudgetTracker
    Saves the current budget data to persistent storage using the UserDatabase.
    saveData(int) - Method in class controller.ExpenseTracker
    Saves expense data to a file for a specific user.
    saveData(int) - Method in class controller.ReminderTracker
    Saves reminders for a specific user to storage.
    saveData(int) - Method in class model.IncomeTracker
    Saves income data for a specific user to a file.
    saveUserData() - Static method in class model.SystemManager
    Saves the current user's data to disk.
    saveUsers(ArrayList<User>) - Static method in class storage.UserDatabase
    Saves the list of users to the file system.
    SavingsGoals - Class in controller
    Controller class for the Savings Goals view.
    SavingsGoals() - Constructor for class controller.SavingsGoals
     
    setAmount(double) - Method in class model.Expense
    Sets the monetary amount of the expense.
    setAmount(double) - Method in class model.Reminder
    Sets the financial amount associated with this reminder.
    setAmount(BigDecimal) - Method in class model.Income
    Sets the monetary amount of the income.
    setCategory(String) - Method in class model.Budget
    Sets the category for this budget
    setCategory(String) - Method in class model.Expense
    Sets the category of the expense.
    setCompleted(boolean) - Method in class model.Reminder
    Sets the completion status of this reminder.
    setDate(LocalDate) - Method in class model.Expense
    Sets the date when the expense occurred.
    setDate(LocalDate) - Method in class model.Income
    Sets the date when the income was received.
    setDescription(String) - Method in class model.Expense
    Sets the description of the expense.
    setDescription(String) - Method in class model.Income
    Sets the description of the income.
    setDueDate(LocalDate) - Method in class model.Reminder
    Sets the due date of this reminder.
    setId(String) - Method in class model.Income
    Sets the unique identifier of the income entry.
    setLimit(BigDecimal) - Method in class model.Budget
    Sets the spending limit
    setName(String) - Method in class model.Reminder
    Sets the name or description of this reminder.
    setPassword(String) - Method in class model.User
    Sets the user's password.
    setPeriod(String) - Method in class model.Budget
    Sets the time period
    setRecurring(boolean) - Method in class model.Expense
    Sets whether the expense is recurring.
    setRecurring(boolean) - Method in class model.Income
    Sets whether the income is recurring.
    setRecurringFrequency(String) - Method in class model.Expense
    Sets the frequency of recurrence for recurring expenses.
    setRecurringPeriod(String) - Method in class model.Income
    Sets the period of recurrence for recurring income.
    setReminderDate(LocalDate) - Method in class model.Reminder
    Sets the reminder date of this reminder.
    setReminderId(int) - Method in class model.Reminder
    Sets the unique identifier for this reminder.
    setSource(String) - Method in class model.Income
    Sets the source of the income.
    setUserId(int) - Method in class model.Income
    Sets the ID of the user associated with this income.
    setUserId(int) - Method in class model.Reminder
    Sets the user ID associated with this reminder.
    setUsername(String) - Method in class model.User
    Sets the user's username.
    SignUp - Class in controller
    Controller class for the Sign Up page in a JavaFX application.
    SignUp() - Constructor for class controller.SignUp
     
    start(Stage) - Method in class Main
    Starts the JavaFX application by loading the home page layout and displaying the main window.
    storage - package storage
     
    SystemManager - Class in model
    Manages the current user's session and provides access to data trackers.
